response.justification: Bogdan possesses extensive software engineering experience, including recent work in AI agent infrastructure and cloud technologies, and demonstrates entrepreneurial spirit through his founder role. While his technical expertise and ability to lead development efforts are strong, the resume does not clearly articulate experience at a principal/director level focused on defining broad AI and cloud strategies, advising strategic customers on adoption, or identifying future state opportunities, which are core to this role.
strengths: Extensive experience across various software engineering domains (web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems).
Recent, relevant experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as a founder and strong commitment to software craftsmanship and sharing knowledge.
concerns: Lack of explicit experience in defining broad AI and cloud strategy at a principal/director level.
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge cloud/AI technologies.
Absence of preferred qualifications such as an AI-related Master's/PhD or recognized industry expertise specifically in AI strategy beyond implementation.

key_factors.factor: Overall Software Engineering Experience & Technical Leadership
